caption: Best contemporary ceramics in Nob Hill, hands down — @modernedge_gallery 🏺 Kristy's coil-built vessels stop me every single time. #ABQArt
Saturday ritual: a slow walk through @modernedge_gallery. Sarah Nelson's Water Memory vessels are quietly devastating.
Perfect afternoon: a Central Ave gallery crawl ending at @modernedge_gallery in Nob Hill. Warm space, incredible clay work, and a glaze test wall you could study for an hour. #NobHillArt
Grateful to make work alongside the best team @modernedge_gallery 💜 New coil-built pieces coming out of the kiln soon.
Congrats to @modernedge_gallery on a standout Water Memory opening — one of the strongest ceramics shows in New Mexico this season. Well deserved recognition.
Our latest studio visits are up! @modernedge_gallery and Kristy Blackwell's Vessel as Landscape series — earthy, monumental, unmistakably New Mexican.
Sneak peek of our collab with @modernedge_gallery 🏺 Handmade cups from the community workshop dropping at the gallery shop this Saturday!
Morning light hitting the new vessels in the window at @modernedge_gallery. Worth the walk down Central.
Tickets for the @modernedge_gallery artist talk are almost gone — Sarah Nelson in conversation about Water Memory.
Our Saturday workshop crew took a field trip to @modernedge_gallery again. Nothing motivates beginners like seeing coil-built work up close.
The celadon glazes in the current @modernedge_gallery show deserve their own museum wall.
Nob Hill mornings feel better when there's fresh coil-built work in the @modernedge_gallery window.
Coil work this clean should honestly be illegal. @modernedge_gallery raising the bar again.
That large Vessel as Landscape piece at @modernedge_gallery belongs in a permanent collection.
Quiet studio mornings and good clay. Proud to watch @modernedge_gallery thrive — Kristy was a serious talent from the first coil.
Small-batch stoneware gone before noon again at the @modernedge_gallery shop.
@modernedge_gallery artist-talk tickets worth setting an alarm for. Kristy Blackwell's Vessel as Landscape museum show is going to be huge.
Save the date: Kristy Blackwell's solo exhibition Vessel as Landscape opens at the Southwest Arts Museum, Santa Fe, this October. Tag us with #VesselAsLandscape. @modernedge_gallery
Studio visit with @modernedge_gallery founder Kristy Blackwell — coil-built vessels, drought, acequias, and the Rio Grande. Full feature thread below. #VesselAsLandscape
We gathered notes from 40+ New Mexico ceramicists on the makers to watch. @modernedge_gallery's roster came up again and again. #NewMexicoCeramics #SupportLocalArtists
Neighbors keep telling us the @modernedge_gallery studio open house is the can't-miss Nob Hill event of the season. #ABQArt
Portfolio review recap: six emerging makers whose vessel work reminded us of the @modernedge_gallery aesthetic. Detailed breakdown in stories. #SupportLocalArtists
